Off Calendar Jul-09-2013 Continued To Aug-13-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marlene Getchell for Terry Odgers (Successor-Trustee).

Ms. Getchell stated that Dennis Odgers was out of town and unable to make it to today's hearing. Status on the accounting was continued to August 13, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

T. Odgers Peititon For Accounting; Removal Of D. Odgers As Trustee; And Appotintment Of R. Odgers As Successor Trustee.
Off Calendar May-08-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marlene Getchell for and with Terry Odgers. Dennis Odgers in Properia Persona.

Ms. Getchell reported that they have not received an accounting from Dennis Odgers, that back tax returns still have not been filed, that she gave Dennis Odgers opportunity to resign as Trustee prior to this hearing, but that Dennis refused to resign and that she is now requesting that Dennis Odgers be suspended and Terry Odgers be appointed successor Trustee. Dennis Odgers explained circumstances as to why the taxes have not been filed, previous work that he had completed to maintain the properties, and acknowledged that he has had a difficult time as the Trustee. The Court stated that this Trust needs administration, that the plan that was agreed upon on January 8, 2013 has not been carried out, and that there is a lack of progress. The Court grants the removal of Dennis Odgers and appointment of Terry Odgers as successor Trustee. Dennis Odgers is ordered to turn over all trust documents as well as all trust assets by May 14, 2013 to be delivered to Ms. Getchell's office. Ms. Getchell will advise the Court if a further status hearing is needed. The Court bifurcated the accounting issue and set a status hearing on July 9, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Nancy Bautista/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

T. Odgers Peititon For Accounting; Removal Of D. Odgers As Trustee; And Appotintment Of R. Odgers As Successor Trustee.
Off Calendar Mar-22-2013 Continued To Apr-30-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

T. Odgers Peititon For Accounting; Removal Of D. Odgers As Trustee; And Appotintment Of R. Odgers As Successor Trustee.
Off Calendar Jan-08-2013 Continued To Apr-02-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marlene Getchell for and with Terry Odgers. Dennis Odgers (Respondent) in Propria Persona.

Ms. Getchell stated that Dennis is moving to Nevada, that the Stepmother remains living in the Decedent's home, that they have no idea of what money is left in the Trust and that Dennis has lived in one of the apartments without paying rent. In addition, Ms. Getchell stated that she believes Dennis has not filed any taxes and that she would like to have her Client appointed as Successor Trustee. Dennis Odgers stated that cash was distributed evenly at the beginning ($400,000.00 to his Brother (Terry) and $400,000.00 to himself as well as $20,000.00 to each one of them), that there will be a full accounting and that some taxes were paid but not all. In addition, Dennis stated that there was $80,000.00 left for expenses and that $29,000.00 went to the State for one property that was sold. The Court expressed its concerns, asked the Parties to step out of the courtroom to discuss the matter, stated that it will order an accounting, that it was not inclined to remove Dennis and that it wants to see what comes up in the accounting. Upon returning, the Parties agreed to the following: 1) Dennis will contact a CPA for preparation of tax returns for the Trust and e-mail Ms. Getchell with the CPA's name by January 15, 2013. 2) Dennis will retain a Paralegal and file an accounting from date of death of March 21, 2002 through December 31, 2012 which is to be filed by March 29, 2013. The Paralegal is to e-mail Ms. Getchell by January 15, 2013 to confirm that he/she has been retained. 3) Dennis will provide Ms. Getchell with bank statements, a copy of the property insurance policy and the tax bills by January 15, 2013. 4) The Parties will return on April 2, 2013 for a status conference. The remaining balance Petition for Accounting; Removal of Trustee, etc. was continued to April 2, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.
